next_sub.desc: Construct an initial tour using a greedy heuristic (e.g., Nearest Neighbor or Farthest Insertion) and then apply a local search optimization (e.g., 2-opt) to improve it. Repeat with multiple starting points or initial constructions.

next_sub_in.desc: Construct an initial tour using a greedy heuristic (e.g., Nearest Neighbor or Farthest Insertion) and then apply a local search optimization (e.g., 2-opt) to improve it. Repeat with multiple starting points or initial constructions.
